info.title: The argument 'SolutionFile' is required
info.description:
Usage - PCLMock.CodeGeneration.Console <SolutionFile> <ConfigurationFile> <OutputFile> -options
GlobalOption              Description
SolutionFile* (-S)        The solution file to examine for potential mocks
to be generated.
ConfigurationFile* (-C)   The XML input file describing which mocks should
be generated, and how they should be named.
OutputFile* (-O)          The output file containing the generated code.
Language (-L)             Optionally force the language in which to generate
mocks.
CSharp
VisualBasic
Verbose (-V)              Turn on verbose output.

options.name: --language
options.description:
Optionally force the language in which to generate
mocks.
CSharp
VisualBasic
